tasks.subject: Task 0: Create scripts/db.sh (container DB backend + sourceable helpers)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** One concise script for dev Postgres lifecycle via compose.yaml (podman/docker auto-detect), bounded readiness check (kills the infinite-hang), sourceable for the harness pg() helper.

**Files:** Create scripts/db.sh

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/db.sh"], "verifyCommand": "scripts/db.sh start && scripts/db.sh ensure && scripts/db.sh status", "acceptanceCriteria": ["start waits until pg_isready ok (<=30s)", "ensure no-op when ready", "sourcing defines compose_cmd/pg/db_ensure with no subcommand run", "engine = PROHIBITORUM_COMPOSE else podman else docker; --help needs no engine"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Rewrite mise.toml catalog, drop Postgres pin, delete dev-db.sh
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Switch to the 13-visible catalog: merged dev:server, renamed dev:dashboard/dev:openapi, arg-driven db, hidden build:web/ci:go/ci:frontend, DB-ensure in dev tasks. Remove the mise Postgres cluster.

**Files:** Modify mise.toml; regenerate mise.lock (mise lock); delete scripts/dev-db.sh

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mise.toml", "mise.lock", "scripts/dev-db.sh"], "verifyCommand": "mise tasks && mise run db status && grep -c postgresql-binaries mise.lock", "acceptanceCriteria": ["mise tasks lists exactly 13 visible tasks", "build:web/ci:go/ci:frontend hidden but runnable", "mise run db start|stop|status|migrate work; bare db prints usage", "dev:openapi regenerates openapi.yaml", "no postgresql-binaries in mise.lock; dev-db.sh deleted"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Route harness scripts through db.sh (kill the hang)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** dev-federation.sh + dev-forward-auth.sh source db.sh, call db_ensure (auto-start), and route all psql/createdb through the in-container pg() helper. No host psql probe.

**Files:** Modify scripts/dev-federation.sh, scripts/dev-forward-auth.sh

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/dev-federation.sh", "scripts/dev-forward-auth.sh"], "verifyCommand": "bash -n scripts/dev-federation.sh && bash -n scripts/dev-forward-auth.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no host psql reachability probe in either script", "both source db.sh + call db_ensure before DB use", "all psql/createdb go through pg()", "DB stopped: dev:federation auto-starts not hangs"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Point CI smoke at the container DB deterministically
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ci.yml smoke job sets PROHIBITORUM_COMPOSE=docker compose (deterministic on GitHub runners); local stays auto-detect. (ci:smoke task body already updated in Task 1.)

**Files:** Modify .github/workflows/ci.yml

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/ci.yml"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n PROHIBITORUM_COMPOSE .github/workflows/ci.yml && mise run ci:smoke", "acceptanceCriteria": ["smoke step sets PROHIBITORUM_COMPOSE: docker compose", "no workflow references removed task names", "mise run ci:smoke passes locally"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Update docs — TOOLING.md + compose.yaml
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Docs match new reality: container-only dev DB, 4-namespace catalog, new quick-ref. No doc points at a removed command or the mise Postgres cluster.

**Files:** Modify TOOLING.md, compose.yaml

```json:metadata
{"files": ["TOOLING.md", "compose.yaml"], "verifyCommand": "grep -rn 'db:start|db:up|build:web|build:openapi|dev:run|dev:web|dev-db.sh|theseus-rs|podman-free' TOOLING.md compose.yaml", "acceptanceCriteria": ["dev DB described container-only (mise run db start)", "namespaces table lists dev/db/ci/prod with new names", "quick reference uses mise run db start + dev:server", "no stale command refs in TOOLING.md/compose.yaml"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Final verification & done-gate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prove the redesign works end-to-end and nothing dangles.

**Files:** none (verification)

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "mise run ci && mise run ci:smoke && mise tasks", "acceptanceCriteria": ["mise tasks shows exactly 13 in 4 groups", "mise run ci green", "mise run ci:smoke green on compose DB", "cold dev:server (DB down) comes up on :8080", "no repo ref to removed task names or dev-db.sh"]}
```
